subcodes.first_line: The Book, made known from God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who turned towards God when the horizon of Revelation shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب معلوم من الله المهیمن القیوم الی الذی اقبل الی الله اذ انار افق الظهور
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
